data.title: Institutional adoption of crypto advances in round 2 with Morgan Stanley, according to Binance Research's analysis.
data.description: According to a report by Binance Research, the cryptocurrency markets are shifting into a new stage where institutional investment and strategic positioning are becoming more influential compared to the previous retail-driven momentum. This change indicates a significant transition in market dynamics towards a more professional and sophisticated approach.

data.title: ETFs for Bitcoin and Ethereum lose most of their 2026 gains amid waning Fed rate cut expectations, leading to significant crypto fund outflows.
data.description: The value of Bitcoin and Ethereum ETFs has drastically decreased, erasing almost all gains from 2026 due to declining expectations of a Federal Reserve interest rate cut. This has led to significant outflows from crypto funds.

data.title: Scott & Jon's #19 on Instacart's Fastest-Growing Brands list, #1 in Frozen Complete Meals, 2026.
data.description: In Auburn, Maine on January 12, 2026, Scott & Jon's start the year with significant success by securing the 19th position on Instacart's Fastest-Growing Emerging Brands list. They have also claimed the top spot in Frozen Complete Meals category on the platform. This prestigious annual list showcases brands that are highly preferred by consumers, with Scott & Jon's standing out among the rest.

data.title: PulseAI, based in Belfast, secures seed funding led by Innovation Ulster Limited for advancing AI-driven ECG diagnostics.
data.description: In Belfast, Northern Ireland on January 12, 2026, PulseAI, a rising star in AI-driven cardiac diagnostic technology, revealed the completion of its seed funding round. The round was spearheaded by Innovation Ulster Limited and saw contributions from The Mortara Group and The Francis Crick. No specific financial figures were disclosed in the announcement.

data.title: VelaFi platform secures $20M to expand cross-border settlement services in Latin America, US, Asia.
data.description: The financial support will facilitate the growth of enterprise payment and settlement services in Latin America, the United States, and Asia.

data.title: Lido DAO (LDO) aims $0.75-$0.85 by Feb 2026 with 20-37% upside from $0.62. Bullish MACD signals noted.
data.description: Lido DAO (LDO) is displaying positive MACD signals, indicating a bullish trend. Analysts are predicting a price target of $0.75 to $0.85 by early February 2026, which would represent a potential upside of 20% to 37% from its current price of $0.62.

data.title: Report on Cold Chain Tracking Market - 5th Edition profiles 75+ tracking solution providers. Also includes insights from 30 interviews with leading companies. Offered by ResearchAndMarkets.com.
data.description: A report titled "The Cold Chain Tracking and Monitoring Market - 5th Edition" has recently been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. This report provides valuable insights into the implementation of tracking solutions for refrigerated cargo and cargo containers. This includes trailers, intermodal containers, air freight ULDs, and rail wagons. The market offers crucial information for tracking solution providers, device vendors, cargo transportation stakeholders, and telecommunication companies.

data.title: Bitfinex warns against big Bitcoin pumps; remains constructive for 2026, but expects limited near-term growth due to geopolitical uncertainty.
data.description: Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) has shown a recovery from recent lows in late November, with Bitfinex expressing positive views for the medium term in 2026. Despite this, the exchange cautions that short-term growth potential may be restricted. The recent blog post by Bitfinex highlights factors such as geopolitical uncertainties, varying spot ETF flows, and the importance of maintaining sustained levels above resistance levels which have constrained Bitcoin within a range. Derivatives markets underwent a reset towards the end of the year, resulting in clearing of legacy positions and paving the way for a more streamlined framework characterized by cautious optimism. For more details, the complete article can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Stewart names Matt Orlando as President of Informative Research, leading growth strategy. NYSE: STC.
data.description: In Houston, Stewart Information Services Corporation (NYSE: STC) has appointed Matt Orlando as the President of Informative Research (IR), a prominent provider of credit, consumer, and real estate data alongside technology services. Orlando's role involves spearheading IR's growth strategy and product development within Stewart's objective of establishing an encompassing, customer-centric real estate services platform. His leadership and extensive industry knowledge are expected to enhance IR's capabilities significantly, reflecting Stewart's vision for a comprehensive real estate services approach.

data.title: HCLTech's Q3 FY26 revenue up 4.2% QoQ, annualized revenue crosses $15B, bookings at $3B, revenue guidance raised.
data.description: HCLTech, a global technology company, has increased its revenue guidance to a year-over-year growth of 4.0% - 4.5% on a constant currency basis. Additionally, the services revenue guidance has been raised to 4.75% - 5.25% year-over-year on a constant currency basis. This update was announced from New York and Noida, India on January 12, 2026. HCLTech's stock is listed on the National Stock Exchange under the symbol HCLTECH.NS and on the Bombay Stock Exchange under the symbol HCLTECH.BO.
